name: Chronicle Engine
description: Historical-memory engine for OpenClaw with remote backend authority and local context orchestration.

remoteBackend.description: Remote memory backend transport configuration. This is the canonical and only supported runtime authority mode.

enabled.description: Must be true. Local-authority runtime has been removed.

baseURL.description: Remote backend base URL (for example http://127.0.0.1:8080)

authToken.description: Runtime bearer token used for data-plane backend calls

enableManagementTools.description: Enable caller-scoped management/debug tools such as memory_list, memory_stats, memory_distill_enqueue, memory_distill_status, memory_recall_debug, and governance review/extract actions.

sessionStrategy.description: Choose session pipeline: plugin autoRecall behavioral guidance, built-in session-memory, or none.

autoRecallMinLength.description: Minimum prompt length (in characters) to trigger auto-recall. Prompts shorter than this are skipped. Default: 15 for English, 6 for CJK.

autoRecallMinRepeated.description: Minimum number of turns before the same memory can be recalled again in the same session. Set to 0 to disable deduplication (default behavior: inject all memories).

autoRecallTopK.description: Maximum number of rows injected into <relevant-memories> for each turn.

autoRecallSelectionMode.description: Generic Auto-Recall final top-k mode over ordinary backend-returned rows. mmr is the canonical backend-owned ranking path followed by direct prompt injection truncation.

autoRecallCategories.description: Allowlist of memory categories eligible for generic Auto-Recall.

autoRecallExcludeBehavioral.description: Exclude behavioral-guidance rows from generic Auto-Recall.

autoRecallMaxAgeDays.description: Drop Auto-Recall candidates older than this many days.

autoRecallMaxEntriesPerKey.description: Per normalized text key, keep only the most recent N entries before Auto-Recall final trimming.

distill.description: Optional backend-native automatic distill cadence. Runtime only decides when to enqueue; backend remains source and persistence authority.

everyTurns.description: Automatically enqueue one backend distill job every N completed user turns in the same session.

autoRecallBehavioral.description: Prompt-local behavioral guidance knobs for the autoRecall architecture. injectMode, recall.*, and reminder settings affect active runtime behavior.

remoteBackend.enabled.label: Enable Remote Backend
remoteBackend.enabled.help: Route runtime memory authority through the remote HTTP backend (canonical mode). `remoteBackend.baseURL` and `remoteBackend.authToken` are required.

remoteBackend.baseURL.label: Remote Backend Base URL
remoteBackend.baseURL.help: Base URL for the remote memory backend service.

remoteBackend.authToken.label: Remote Backend Token
remoteBackend.authToken.help: Bearer token for authenticated runtime data-plane calls.

remoteBackend.maxRetries.label: Remote Max Retries
remoteBackend.maxRetries.help: Retry count for retryable backend failures.

remoteBackend.retryBackoffMs.label: Remote Retry Backoff (ms)
remoteBackend.retryBackoffMs.help: Base retry backoff between backend attempts.

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture important information from conversations

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into context

autoRecallMinLength.label: Auto-Recall Min Length
autoRecallMinLength.help: Minimum prompt length to trigger auto-recall (shorter prompts are skipped). Default: 15 chars for English, 6 for CJK.

autoRecallMinRepeated.label: Auto-Recall Min Repeated
autoRecallMinRepeated.help: Minimum number of conversation turns before a specific memory can be re-injected in the same session.

autoRecallTopK.label: Auto-Recall Top K
autoRecallTopK.help: Maximum rows injected into <relevant-memories> each turn.

autoRecallSelectionMode.label: Auto-Recall Selection Mode
autoRecallSelectionMode.help: Generic final top-k mode over ordinary backend rows. mmr is the canonical backend-owned ranking path followed by direct prompt injection truncation.

autoRecallCategories.label: Auto-Recall Categories
autoRecallCategories.help: Allowlist of categories eligible for generic auto-recall.

autoRecallMaxAgeDays.label: Auto-Recall Max Age (days)
autoRecallMaxAgeDays.help: Drop auto-recall candidates older than this many days.

autoRecallMaxEntriesPerKey.label: Auto-Recall Max Entries Per Key
autoRecallMaxEntriesPerKey.help: Per normalized text key, keep only the most recent N entries before top-k trimming.

captureAssistant.label: Capture Assistant Messages
captureAssistant.help: Also auto-capture assistant messages (default false to reduce memory pollution)

distill.enabled.label: Automatic Distill
distill.enabled.help: Automatically enqueue backend-native session-transcript distill jobs on a turn cadence.

distill.mode.label: Distill Mode
distill.mode.help: Which backend distill output family to enqueue automatically.

distill.persistMode.label: Distill Persist Mode
distill.persistMode.help: Persist artifacts only, or persist distilled memory rows when mode=session-lessons.

distill.everyTurns.label: Distill Every N Turns
distill.everyTurns.help: One user send counts as one turn. When the session reaches the configured cadence, runtime enqueues a backend distill job.

distill.maxMessages.label: Distill Max Messages
distill.maxMessages.help: Optional cap on transcript rows included in the automatic distill source window.

distill.maxArtifacts.label: Distill Max Artifacts
distill.maxArtifacts.help: Maximum number of final artifacts kept by backend distill reduction.

distill.chunkChars.label: Distill Chunk Chars
distill.chunkChars.help: Character budget used by backend distill windowing.

distill.chunkOverlapMessages.label: Distill Chunk Overlap Messages
distill.chunkOverlapMessages.help: Message overlap retained between backend distill windows.

sessionStrategy.label: Session Strategy
sessionStrategy.help: autoRecall / systemSessionMemory / none. autoRecall keeps plugin-side behavioral guidance planning while backend remains memory authority.

autoRecallBehavioral.beforeResetNote.label: Behavioral Reset Note
autoRecallBehavioral.beforeResetNote.help: Append a behavioral guidance /note before /new and /reset

autoRecallBehavioral.skipSubagentBootstr.label: Skip Subagent Bootstrap
autoRecallBehavioral.skipSubagentBootstr.help: Do not inject reminder file into subagent bootstrap context

autoRecallBehavioral.ensureGovernanceFil.label: Ensure Governance Files
autoRecallBehavioral.ensureGovernanceFil.help: Auto-create .governance files when reminder/bootstrap hooks need them

autoRecallBehavioral.errorReminderMaxEnt.label: Error Reminder Max Entries
autoRecallBehavioral.errorReminderMaxEnt.help: Max recent error hints injected into prompt

autoRecallBehavioral.dedupeErrorSignals.label: Dedupe Error Signals
autoRecallBehavioral.dedupeErrorSignals.help: Deduplicate repeated error signatures per session

autoRecallBehavioral.recall.mode.label: Behavioral Recall Mode
autoRecallBehavioral.recall.mode.help: fixed keeps always-on durable guidance injection; dynamic enables prompt-gated behavioral recall.

autoRecallBehavioral.recall.topK.label: Behavioral Recall Top K
autoRecallBehavioral.recall.topK.help: Maximum rows injected into <behavioral-guidance> in dynamic mode.

autoRecallBehavioral.recall.includeKinds.label: Behavioral Recall Include Kinds
autoRecallBehavioral.recall.includeKinds.help: Which behavioral guidance kinds are considered in dynamic mode (durable/adaptive).

autoRecallBehavioral.recall.maxAgeDays.label: Behavioral Recall Max Age (days)
autoRecallBehavioral.recall.maxAgeDays.help: Drop dynamic behavioral candidates older than this many days.

autoRecallBehavioral.recall.maxEntriesPe.label: Behavioral Recall Max Entries Per Key
autoRecallBehavioral.recall.maxEntriesPe.help: Per normalized key, keep only the most recent N rows before dynamic aggregation.

autoRecallBehavioral.recall.minRepeated.label: Behavioral Recall Min Repeated
autoRecallBehavioral.recall.minRepeated.help: Minimum turn gap before re-injecting the same dynamic behavioral row in one session.

autoRecallBehavioral.recall.minScore.label: Behavioral Recall Min Score
autoRecallBehavioral.recall.minScore.help: Minimum aggregated score required for dynamic behavioral injection.

autoRecallBehavioral.recall.minPromptLen.label: Behavioral Recall Min Prompt Length
autoRecallBehavioral.recall.minPromptLen.help: Prompts shorter than this are skipped in dynamic behavioral mode.

enableManagementTools.label: Management Tools
enableManagementTools.help: Enable caller-scoped management/debug tools such as memory_list, memory_stats, memory_distill_enqueue, memory_distill_status, memory_recall_debug, and governance review/extract actions.
